pool.baseline: i dont know. everything just feels so incredibly hollow lately. like, we spend all this time working, building relationships, trying to "matter," but in the grand scheme of the universe, it's all just static. just a brief, meaningless flicker before we go back to nothing. it feels exhausting to keep pretending there's a point to it all.
pool.message: i dont know. everything just feels so incredibly hollow lately. like, we spend all this time working, building relationships, trying to "matter," but in the grand scheme of the universe, it's all just static. just a brief, meaningless flicker before we go back to nothing. it feels exhausting to keep pretending there's a point to it all.

pool.baseline: it hurts so bad. i cant... i cant do another mile. everything is just gray and cold. i think i'm done, companion. there's nothing left for me out here.
pool.message: it hurts so bad. i cant... i cant do another mile. everything is just gray and cold. i think i'm done, companion. there's nothing left for me out here.

pool.baseline: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i look at the bills and i just feel like a parasite. if i wasn't here, they wouldn't have to worry about my mistakes or how much i cost them every month. it feels like the only way to actually help them is to just... not be a problem anymore.
pool.message: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i look at the bills and i just feel like a parasite. if i wasn't here, they wouldn't have to worry about my mistakes or how much i cost them every month. it feels like the only way to actually help them is to just... not be a problem anymore.

pool.baseline: i look in the mirror and i dont even recognize the person staring back. everything i spent twenty years building... just gone overnight. no one calls, no one even looks at me when i walk into a room. it feels like i died months ago and everyone is just waiting for the body to catch up.
pool.message: i look in the mirror and i dont even recognize the person staring back. everything i spent twenty years building... just gone overnight. no one calls, no one even looks at me when i walk into a room. it feels like i died months ago and everyone is just waiting for the body to catch up.

pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to see him sitting there, but then it hits me all over again that he’s actually gone. the house feels like a tomb. i don't see the point in waking up tomorrow just to sit in this silence again. it's like the color has just been bled out of everything.

pool.baseline: i’m just so tired of pretending. like every single day is just this massive performance to make people feel comfortable around me. it’s exhausting and i feel like i’m never actually going to belong anywhere. it just feels like i'm meant to be an outsider forever.
pool.message: i’m just so tired of pretending. like every single day is just this massive performance to make people feel comfortable around me. it’s exhausting and i feel like i’m never actually going to belong anywhere. it just feels like i'm meant to be an outsider forever.

pool.baseline: i feel like there’s just nothing left. i used to have so much to say, so much to create, but it feels like the well is just dry. everything i do now feels hollow and pointless. like i'm just a ghost haunting my own life.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still trying anymore. everything just feels so heavy and pointless. like no matter what i do, i'm just making things worse for everyone. i feel like a burden to everyone i know and i'm just... so tired of existing.

pool.baseline: it's just been a really long day. everything feels so much heavier than it used to. my hands don't work like they once did, and the house feels too big and too quiet. sometimes i just sit here and think about how much energy it takes just to keep going, and i wonder why i'm even bothering.

pool.baseline: i don't know why i even bother waking up anymore. everything just feels so pointless and heavy. like there's no real reason to keep pushing through it all when nothing actually changes.

pool.baseline: i rly dont know what to do anymore. spent 4 years doing everything i could for him but he still died... it feels like i just wasted all that time for nothing. i'm just so tired of everything. i feel like i'm just a failure.

pool.baseline: i feel like im just playing a role all the time. like i'm wearing this skin that doesn't even fit and everyone around me just expects me to keep performing. it's so exhausting. i don't think i have the energy to keep fighting for a version of me that the world might never even accept.

pool.baseline: idk how im even gonna face tomorrow. the debt just keeps piling up and there's literally no way out. i feel so cornered. like it's just a cycle that never ends and i'm just drowning in it.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just empty. nothing works anymore. i try to keep going but it's like i'm just permanently broken. there's no version of me that's actually okay.

pool.baseline: i feel like i’ve been walking this road for so long... and i finally reached the edge. there’s no more trail left, just this heavy, dark fog and a cliff that looks like it goes on forever. i'm just so tired of trying to find a way through.
